title: qavor stateful service manifest
description: Externally provided stateful service (postgres, kafka, redis, ...). Lives at the root of a stateful-dep repo as `qavor.yaml`, or under a sub-directory of a deps repo (e.g. `postgresql/qavor.yaml`). At v0 stateful services run via `docker-compose` and qavor owns the generated compose project (per ADR-005).

name.description: Stateful service identifier. Must be unique within the workspace.

groups.description: Additional group memberships for this stateful service.

runtime.description: Available runtime backends. v0 stateful services delegate to `docker-compose`; `native` and `docker` are reserved for future use.

mode.description: Default run mode. v0 stateful services should use `docker-compose`.

env.description: Layered env block. `publish` is the explicit contract exposed to dependents at start time; values are interpolated against the resolved env of this stateful service.
